title: asperula cynanchica var. paui
intro: Asperula cynanchica var. paui, also known as Pyramidal Woodruff, is a plant species within the gentian family, characterized by its clusters of small white flowers and a square stem. The medicinal properties of Pyramidal Woodruff include its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues and reducing pain and swelling. The health benefits of using Pyramidal Woodruff include relief from coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as potential anti-cancer and antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of Pyramidal Woodruff can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant in tincture or capsule form, although further research is necessary to confirm its full range of medicinal properties and potential uses.
